title: convolvulus biflorus
intro: Convolvulus biflorus, also known as the small-flowered morning glory, is a perennial vine plant that belongs to the Convolvulaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which help in treating wounds, infections, and fever. The health benefits of Convolvulus biflorus include its ability to reduce stress, improve sleep, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and depression. The herbal preparations of Convolvulus biflorus include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the leaves and flowers in hot water or a solvent like ethanol.
